texto: I like a lot of things about yoga - its an intro to good music; with each good teacher you study with, you learn a lot about them personally; it's not just about specific technique or poses. I also like Shavasana - not too many exercise routines let you nap at the end of them. You don't see nap pods in CrossFit gyms.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charles Michael Davis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I like a lot of things about yoga - its an intro to good music; with each good teacher you study …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, music, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de estudos e termino.
